title: saxifraga purpurascens var. insularis
intro: Saxifraga purpurascens var. insularis, also known as Island Saxifrage, is a rare and endangered flowering plant species native to the islands of the Azores and Madeira. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Island Saxifrage include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Saxifraga purpurascens var. insularis, such as teas or infusions, are made by steeping the dried leaves and flowers in hot water, but further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
